title: Academic Cloud Computing Degree
content:
Bachelor of Science in Cloud Computing - Degree Requirements
Morgan State University

---

DEGREE OVERVIEW
A minimum of 120 credit hours are required to graduate with a B.S. in Cloud Computing.

Credit Distribution:
- General Education and University Requirements: 44 credits
- Supporting Courses: 14 credits
- Required Courses for the Cloud Computing Major: 62 credits
- Total Credits: 120

---

REQUIRED COURSES FOR CLOUD COMPUTING MAJOR (62 credits)

COSC 111 - Introduction to Computer Science I
Credits: 4
Prerequisite: None
Offered: Fall/Spring

COSC 112 - Introduction to Computer Science II
Credits: 4
Prerequisite: COSC 111 with a grade of "C" or higher
Offered: Fall/Spring

COSC 220 - Data Structures and Algorithms
Credits: 4
Prerequisite: COSC 112 with a grade of "C" or higher
Offered: Fall/Spring

COSC 241 - Computer System and Digital Logic
Credits: 3
Prerequisite: COSC 112 and MATH 141 with grades of "C" or higher, or departmental permission
Offered: Fall/Spring

COSC 349 - Computer Networks
Credits: 3
Prerequisite: COSC 112 with a grade of "C" or higher
Offered: As needed

COSC 351 - Cybersecurity
Credits: 3
Prerequisite: COSC 112 with a grade of "C" or higher
Offered: Fall/Spring

COSC 354 - Operating Systems
Credits: 3
Prerequisite: COSC 220 and COSC 241 with grades of "C" or higher
Offered: Fall/Spring

CLCO 261 - Introduction to Cloud Computing
Credits: 3
Prerequisite: COSC 112 with a grade of "C" or higher
Offered: Fall/Spring

CLCO 401 - Cloud Applications
Credits: 3
Prerequisite: CLCO 261 with a grade of "C" or higher
Offered: As needed

CLCO 490 - Senior Project in Cloud Computing
Credits: 3
Prerequisite: Department chair permission and senior standing
Offered: As needed

---

GROUP A ELECTIVES (Choose required number)

COSC 238 - Object-Oriented Programming
Credits: 4
Prerequisite: COSC 112 with a grade of "C" or higher
Offered: Fall/Spring

COSC 239 - Java Programming
Credits: 3
Prerequisite: COSC 112 with a grade of "C" or higher
Offered: As offered

COSC 243 - Computer Architecture
Credits: 3
Prerequisite: COSC 241 with a grade of "C" or higher
Offered: Fall/Spring

COSC 251 - Introduction to Data Science
Credits: 3
Prerequisite: COSC 112 with a grade of "C" or higher
Offered: Fall/Spring

COSC 281 - Discrete Structures
Credits: 3
Prerequisite: COSC 112 with a grade of "C" or higher
Offered: Fall/Spring

---

PROGRAM HIGHLIGHTS
- Focus on cloud technologies and infrastructure
- Hands-on experience with major cloud platforms
- Preparation for cloud certifications (AWS, Azure, Google Cloud)
- Strong foundation in computer science fundamentals
- Capstone project in cloud computing
